title: Santo and Blue Demon vs. the Monsters
original_title: Santo el enmascarado de plata y Blue Demon contra los monstruos
overview: Bruno Halder a sinister scientist seeking revenge against his brother and niece is resurrected by Waldo his faithful sidekick. Besides his minions of zombies Halder enlists the help of Wolfman, Franquestain, a Vampire, a Mummy and a Cyclops. Once again the survival of mankind is put in the hands of Santo

trailers.title: SANTO & BLUE DEMON VS LOS MONSTRUOS (The Monsters)

trailer_groups.title: SANTO & BLUE DEMON VS LOS MONSTRUOS (The Monsters)

en.title: SANTO & BLUE DEMON VS LOS MONSTRUOS (The Monsters)
